{"query":"Fred High Jewelry Trilogy conclusion Golden Light chapter details July 13 2026 LVMH","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1362,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.lvmh.com/en/news-lvmh/fred-celebrates-90-years-with-the-final-chapter-of-the-monsieur-fred-high-jewelry-trilogy","title":"Fred Celebrates 90 Years with the Final Chapter of... - LVMH","content":"To mark its 90th anniversary, Fred unveils Golden Light, the third and final chapter of the Monsieur Fred High Jewelry collection inspired by the life and vision of founder Fred Samuel.
Inspired by the landscapes of the French Riviera and the Soleil d'Or, Fred's legendary yellow diamond, the collection captures the warmth, brilliance and colors that shaped the founder's creative world.
Following Inner Light, dedicated to Fred Samuel's legacy, and Ideal Light, inspired by his childhood in Argentina, Golden Light traces the changing light of the Mediterranean, from the first glow of dawn to the golden hour.
A second interpretation, set with a Fancy Intense Yellow diamond of more than 11 carats, offers another way to wear the design while preserving the Soleil d'Or itself.
With Golden Light, Fred brings the Monsieur Fred trilogy to a close while celebrating one of the symbols that has defined the Maison for nearly ninety years.
More than a conclusion, the collection opens a new chapter for the Soleil d'Or, reaffirming the central role that light continues to play in Fred's creative vision.","date":"5 days ago"},{"url":"https://wwd.com/accessories-news/jewelry/monsieur-fred-golden-light-high-jewelry-collection-reveal-1239047645/","title":"Fred’s 90th Anniversary High Jewelry Masterpiece Is Not for Sale","content":"But Vincent Reynes, chief executive of the LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton-owned jewelry house, stands firm.
“So it’s more a matter of brand, of heritage, of transmission from generation to generation than about business.”
The Soleil d’Or became the literal and symbolic sun around which orbits the third and final chapter of a trilogy of high jewelry collections dedicated to house founder Fred Samuel.
“I challenged myself to set it in a jewel for the first time in its 50-year history,” said vice president and artistic director Valérie Samuel.
Her design for the Golden Light necklace hinges on fil couteau lines of yellow gold that make diamonds — over 1,025 white diamonds for some 137 carats — seem to float over the skin.
Beyond the poetic journey from first light to golden hour, the collection is about burnishing the Fred design language, Samuel said.
Despite its higher ticket, high jewelry is paradoxically more resilient."},{"url":"https://www.10magazine.com.au/articles/freds-presents-new-high-jewellery-collection","title":"FRED PRESENTS MONSIEUR FRED GOLDEN LIGHT | 10 Magazine Australia","content":"The Maison's new High Jewellery collection, titled Monsieur Fred Golden Light, presents the third instalment in the trilogy.
The first chapter, Monsieur Fred Inner Light, celebrated the unique personality of Fred himself; the second, Monsieur Fred High Light, celebrated his love of light; and the third is an ode to the sun's journey across the French Riviera.
Among transformable Australian opals, Colombian emeralds, tourmalines, tanzanites, sapphires and diamonds, the collection tells a story that captures Fred's journey from night to morning, tracing the calm, quiet breaking dawn that began his days in Monaco.","date":"5 days ago"},{"url":"https://www.marketscreener.com/news/lvmh-fred-celebrates-90-years-with-the-final-chapter-of-the-monsieur-fred-high-jewelry-trilogy-ce7f5edfde8ef422","title":"LVMH : Fred Celebrates 90 Years with the Final Chapter of the ...","date":"5 days ago","content":"5 days ago — Fred unveils Golden Light, the third and final chapter of the Monsieur Fred High Jewelry collection inspired by the life and vision of founder ..."}]}

As it celebrates its 90th anniversary, Maison FRED unveils Monsieur Fred Golden Light, the final chapter of a High Jewelry trilogy inspired by its founder, Fred Samuel, a jeweler who devoted his life to the pursuit of light. At its zenith, a first in the Maison's history: the Soleil d'Or, FRED's iconic yellow diamond of more than 100 carats, is set for the very first time as the beating heart of a majestic necklace adorned with more than one thousand diamonds..
